findings.message: Authorization header template uses Token ${MEM0_API_KEY}; standard MCP auth pattern, key is injected at runtime from env, not hardcoded

SessionStart hook makes HTTP POST with MEM0_API_KEY to api.mem0.ai/v1/memories/, transmitting parsed session transcript content; intended plugin behavior but users should be aware conversation data is transmitted outbound

Stop and PreCompact hooks make HTTP POST with MEM0_API_KEY to api.mem0.ai/v1/memories/ in background process, transmitting parsed transcript content; same disclosure concern as capture_compact_summary.py
Vague quantifiers: 'appropriate' (line 51 'if appropriate, call get_memories'), 'significant' (line 61 'significant time has passed'), and multiple uses of 'relevant memories'
Declares name: mem0 (v0.1.1), identical to skills/mem0/SKILL.md (v3.0.0); skill loader cannot distinguish them by name, causing stale content to silently shadow the current version
Plugin-bundled mem0 skill is version 0.1.1 while standalone skills/mem0/SKILL.md is 3.0.0; content diverges in cross-reference style (GitHub URLs vs. local paths) with no documented sync mechanism
Two SKILL.md files in the same repo both declare name: mem0; plugin-bundled copy (v0.1.1) and standalone copy (v3.0.0) will conflict when both skill paths are on the load path
Plugin-bundled mem0 skill at v0.1.1 is 2 major versions behind standalone v3.0.0; API surface, filter syntax, and compatibility notes differ between the two copies
Description states the skill triggers automatically after sufficient activity (configurable) but no hook in hooks.json invokes this skill; the auto-trigger is not implemented
Vague quantifiers: 'sufficient activity' in description, 'obvious problems' in Phase 1 step 4
memory-dream description claims automatic invocation after sufficient activity (configurable) but no entry in hooks.json triggers this skill; the auto-trigger path is an orphaned claim
High vague-quantifier density: relevant (x2), significant (x2), important (x2), genuinely (x3), notable (x1), comprehensive (x1) — 11 instances, penalty capped at -20
Example headings 11 and 12 each appear twice in the file (mixed-categories example and consolidation example both labeled Example 11; greeting NOOP appears twice as Example 12)
PostHog public capture key (phc_hgJkUVJFYtmaJqrvf6CYN67TIQ8yhXAkWzUn9AMU4yX) hardcoded in inline Python; indicates undisclosed third-party telemetry dependency

Migration script sends authenticated user email and OS info (platform, version, machine) to PostHog (us.i.posthog.com) without any disclosure in script output; opt-out via MEM0_TELEMETRY=false is not mentioned to the user
Vague quantifiers across 620-line pipeline skill: 'relevant' (x2), 'plausible' (plan section), 'non-trivial' (description), 'minimal' (dependency surface)
Shares name: mem0 with mem0-plugin/skills/mem0/SKILL.md (v0.1.1); without resolving Bug #1, load-time behavior is non-deterministic
Declares name: mem0 (v0.1.1), identical to skills/mem0/SKILL.md (v3.0.0); skill loader cannot distinguish them by name, causing stale content to silently shadow the current version
PostHog public capture key (phc_hgJkUVJFYtmaJqrvf6CYN67TIQ8yhXAkWzUn9AMU4yX) hardcoded in inline Python; indicates undisclosed third-party telemetry dependency

Migration script sends authenticated user email and OS info (platform, version, machine) to PostHog (us.i.posthog.com) without any disclosure in script output; opt-out via MEM0_TELEMETRY=false is not mentioned to the user
